figures.caption: Figure 1: Fusion architectures. (A) Early Fusion MLP (8.8M params). (B) Cross-Attention (1.8M params). (C) Bilinear Fusion (0.54M params). (D) Gated Fusion (3.2M params). See Section 3 for details.
Table 2 Performance versus interaction. Better models show lower measured interaction. Bootstrap comparison (1,000 iterations) against MLP baseline.
